form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== chartId[控制图] orgId[业务组织] subgroupNo[子组号] sampleTime[采样时间] inspectorId[检验员] =========>measure[测量信息]====== measuredValues[测量值] mean[均值] range[极差] stdDev[标准差] =========>source[来源信息]====== sourceBillType[来源单据类型] sourceCode[来源单号] sourceLineCode[来源行号] =========>control[控制信息]====== violatedRules[违反规则] isOutOfControl[是否失控] defectCount[缺陷数] inspectedCount[检验数] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== chartId[控制图] orgId[业务组织] subgroupNo[子组号] sampleTime[采样时间] inspectorId[检验员] =========>measure[测量信息]====== measuredValues[测量值] mean[均值] range[极差] stdDev[标准差] =========>source[来源信息]====== sourceBillType[来源单据类型] sourceCode[来源单号] sourceLineCode[来源行号] =========>control[控制信息]====== violatedRules[违反规则] isOutOfControl[是否失控] defectCount[缺陷数] inspectedCount[检验数] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注](2) createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: chartId[控制图] subgroupNo[子组号] inspectorId[检验员] isOutOfControl[是否失控] sampleTime[采样时间]
